message:
feat: extend pipeline with CASS-parity output formatting and deduplication

Major expansion of the session processing pipeline to achieve behavioral parity
with the CASS (coding_agent_session_search) tool:

- pipeline.rs: Add output formatting modes (JSON, JSONL, plain text), session
  deduplication logic, content truncation with configurable limits, metadata
  enrichment with token counts and timing, and streaming output support (~379
  lines of new pipeline logic)
- main.rs: Wire new pipeline options into CLI argument parsing, add --format,
  --deduplicate, and --max-tokens flags
- Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock: Add new dependencies for enhanced output formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
